overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a snowy, post-apocalyptic landscape called Maker's End. The character traverses wooden walkways, crosses bridges over water, and approaches ancient mechanical wreckage and ruins in a hazy, teal-tinted winter environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside path with wooden walkway

events.description: location text 'Maker's End' appears on screen as character steps off wooden walkway onto rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden walkway beside a rocky hillside

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation with jagged edges
weathered wooden planks forming a narrow path along the water
tall evergreen trees silhouetted against the hazy sky
large ancient industrial structures visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a narrow wooden walkway built alongside a rocky hillside. The path winds through a cold, teal-tinted landscape with tall pine trees in the background and ancient ruins visible far ahead. Light snow falls as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy river valley with wooden bridges

events.description: crossing wooden bridge over flowing river water

agents.ego_description: walking across wooden bridges spanning a partially frozen river

entered.detail: rickety wooden plank bridges crossing over the water
fast-flowing water visible between the wooden planks
ground covered in patches of snow and ice

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden walkway behind, Aloy steps onto snow-dusted rocky ground and crosses several wooden bridges over a flowing river. The landscape opens up into a wider valley, with the distant ruins drawing closer and the rocky hillside receding to the left.

events.description: large mechanical wreckage and snow drifts become prominent in the landscape
character passes an NPC standing still near the rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward massive mechanical wreckage

notable_agents.action: standing still near rocks wearing red clothing, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: massive ancient mechanical structures partially buried in snow
dilapidated industrial building with broken walls
large piles of accumulated snow against the rocks

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes deeply covered in snow as Aloy approaches massive mechanical wreckage from the ancient civilization. An NPC in red clothing stands near the rocks to the left. The character passes by snow drifts and ruined industrial buildings while heading toward the massive debris field.

events.description: approaching a searchable corpse near the mechanical wreckage, UI prompt appears

agents.ego_description: approaching mechanical wreckage to investigate a searchable corpse

entered.detail: massive ruined industrial complex with tall walls and broken infrastructure

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues through the deep snow toward the massive mechanical wreckage and the ancient industrial complex beyond. The character approaches a corpse near the wreckage that can be searched, indicated by a UI element. The rocky hillside falls behind as the ruins dominate the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cold, teal-tinted wilderness that gradually gives way to a massive field of ancient mechanical wreckage. It begins with Aloy walking along a narrow wooden walkway carved into a rocky hillside under a light snowfall, with distant ruins peering through the pine trees. As she leaves the path, the scene opens into a wider valley where the camera follows her across wooden bridges spanning a flowing river. The terrain then shifts into deep, heavy snow as she passes a figure in red clothing and moves toward ruined industrial buildings. Finally, the rocky hillside recedes entirely as the camera pushes forward through snow drifts toward a corpse and the towering debris of an ancient industrial complex.
